## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in LiquidKit.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build or release infrastructure
- [ ] Breaking change

## Verification

- [ ] `./gradlew :liquidkit:check`
- [ ] `./gradlew :sampleApp:compileDebugKotlinAndroid`
- [ ] `./gradlew :sampleApp:compileKotlinIosSimulatorArm64`

## Notes

Call out API changes, platform-specific behavior, or follow-up work.
